info.title: Ontology Platform MVP6.4 Gold Set Authoring Planning API
info.description: Planning-only OpenAPI artifact for MVP6.4 Gold Set authoring + dataset revisioning. Expert-owned, candidate/analysis-layer authoring over closed MVP6.1 evaluation datasets. Additive; does not replace any prior MVP1-MVP6.3 OpenAPI draft. Wave39 contract-first planning only: no runtime code, models, migrations, or tests. Reuses MVP6.1 EvaluationDataset/EvaluationSample/GoldEntity/GoldRelation/GoldEvidenceRef shapes (mirrored here, not renamed). Frozen by docs/pm/MVP6_4_GOLD_SET_AUTHORING_BRIEF.md and docs/adr/0011.

tags.name: MVP6.4 Gold Set Authoring
tags.description: Additive expert-owned gold-set authoring + dataset revisioning over MVP6.1 evaluation datasets. Every authoring/import response carries an all-false GoldAuthoringMutationGuard; runs are never re-pinned; FROZEN revisions are immutable; gold items/evidence are archived, never hard-deleted.

get.summary: Open a dataset as owner (authoring overview)
get.description: Authoring overview: active revision, gold status counts, run-pin summary, capabilities. All-false mutation guard.

patch.description: Edit a gold entity (label, normalized_value, ontology_class_id, embedded evidence). Records an EDIT audit entry. Rejected if the item belongs to a FROZEN revision.

post.description: Soft-archive a gold entity (GoldItemStatus.ARCHIVED). Never hard-deletes; retained for traceability.
Restore a previously archived gold entity (owner-reversible).

patch.description: Edit a gold relation (ontology_relation_id, endpoints, embedded evidence). Records an EDIT audit entry. Rejected if the item belongs to a FROZEN revision.

post.description: Soft-archive a gold relation. Never hard-deletes; retained for traceability.
Restore a previously archived gold relation (owner-reversible).
Attach a first-class GoldEvidence object to a gold item (EVIDENCE_ATTACH). Rejected if target belongs to a FROZEN revision.

get.description: List standalone GoldEvidence objects in the dataset.

patch.description: Edit a standalone GoldEvidence object (EVIDENCE_EDIT; locator/offsets/quote/source). Rejected if target belongs to a FROZEN revision.

post.description: Soft-archive a standalone GoldEvidence object. Never hard-deletes.

Snapshot current samples + gold items into a new revision (REVISION_CUT). With activate=true the new revision becomes ACTIVE and the prior ACTIVE is FROZEN. Never rewrites any EvaluationRun.dataset_version_id.

get.description: List revisions with status, counts, run-pin count, and frozen reason.
Retrieve one revision (snapshot summary, immutability, pinned-run refs).

post.description: Activate a DRAFT revision as the dataset's ACTIVE (REVISION_ACTIVATE); freezes the prior ACTIVE. At most one ACTIVE per dataset.

get.summary: Export a revision as a JSON bundle
get.description: Read-only single-revision JSON snapshot (samples + gold items + evidence). No prompts, candidates, published graph, or secrets.

post.description: Dry-run a bundle import: returns a GoldSetImportCompatibility report. Mutates nothing.
Confirm a dry-run with a chosen GoldSetImportStrategy (IMPORT). Always creates a new dataset or new revision; never edits a FROZEN revision; never auto-merges; INCOMPATIBLE is blocked.

409.description: Incompatible / strategy required / warnings not acknowledged

get.description: List GoldAuthoringAuditEntry rows (actor, action, target ids, before/after, reason, timestamp). Read-only.

GoldEvidenceRef.description: Reused verbatim from MVP6.1 (apps/backend/app/modules/evaluation/schemas.py). Mirrored here so this planning artifact is standalone; field names are not renamed.

EvaluationSample.description: Reused verbatim from MVP6.1. Mirrored for a standalone artifact; not redefined/renamed.

EvaluationDataset.description: Reused verbatim from MVP6.1. owner_id = enforced expert owner; active_version_id = FK to ACTIVE DatasetRevision.

GoldEntity.description: Reused verbatim from MVP6.1; field names unchanged.

GoldRelation.description: Reused verbatim from MVP6.1; field names unchanged.

GoldItemAuthoringOverlay.description: Additive, optional read-only overlay fields on MVP6.1 GoldEntity/GoldRelation. No MVP6.1 field is renamed.

GoldEvidence.description: First-class standalone evidence object: GoldEvidenceRef fields (not renamed) + id + lifecycle + target gold item ref (gold_entity_id XOR gold_relation_id).

RunRevisionPin.description: Proves run->revision reproducibility. EvaluationRun.dataset_version_id is never rewritten.

GoldEntityEditRequest.description: PATCH semantics; all fields optional but at least one mutating field required. Rejected with 409 GOLD_ITEM_IMMUTABLE on a FROZEN revision.

GoldRelationEditRequest.description: PATCH semantics; at least one mutating field required.

DatasetRevisionCutRequest.description: Snapshots current ACTIVE/DRAFT gold items + samples. activate=true makes the new revision ACTIVE and freezes the prior ACTIVE.

frozen_revision_id.description: Id of the prior ACTIVE revision frozen by this cut/activate, if any. No EvaluationRun pin is ever rewritten.

GoldSetExportBundle.description: Read-only single-revision snapshot. No prompts, candidates, published graph, or secrets.

GoldSetImportConfirmRequest.description: target_dataset_id required iff strategy=NEW_REVISION_OF_EXISTING. acknowledge_warnings required true when dry-run compatibility=WARNING.
